translations.***一樣同前述，WKWebView 是跑在 App 主執行緒之外的獨立執行緒，: ***As mentioned before, WKWebView runs on a separate thread outside the app's main thread, so URLProtocol cannot intercept WKWebView's requests.***
translations.***但完善 HTTP Cache 只是做到緩存部分(第二次進入很快)，預載(第: ***But improving HTTP Cache only affects caching (fast on the second visit), it does not impact preloading (first visit).*** *✅*
translations.***但聽說上黑魔法好像可以，不推薦、會延伸其他問題(送審被拒)***\n\n: ***But I've heard that using black magic might work, though it's not recommended and may cause other issues (app review rejection).***
translations.***另外同前述，WKWebView 是跑在 App 主執行緒之外的獨立執行緒，: ***Also as mentioned above, WKWebView runs on a separate thread outside the app's main thread, so the cache of URLRequest and URLSession is not shared with WKWebView.***
translations.***在 iOS 中網路有關的元件(URLSession, WKWebView…: ***In iOS, network-related components (URLSession, WKWebView, etc.) automatically handle HTTP Request/Response Cache Headers and manage caching. We do not need to handle Cache Header parameters ourselves.***
translations.***意即我不預載整個頁面的所有東西了，我只預載頁面會用到的資源檔案，這些檔案可: ***This means I no longer preload everything on the entire page; I only preload resource files that the page will use, which may also be shared across pages. The page file .html is still fetched from the network and combined with the preloaded files to render the page.***
translations.***經過測試，原理上可行；但是對性能、網路流量損耗太大*** *；使用者可能根: ***After testing, it is technically feasible; however, it causes significant performance and network traffic overhead*** *; users might never even enter the detail page, but we preload all pages anyway, which feels like shooting blindly.*
translations.***經過測試，可以在流量損耗與預載中取得一個不錯的平衡*** *。* 🎉\n\: ***After testing, a good balance between traffic loss and preloading can be achieved*** *.* 🎉
translations.***綜合以上，雖然原理上可行，但是實現上投入巨大；整體來說不符合效益並且很難擴: ***In summary, although it is theoretically feasible, the implementation requires huge investment; overall, it is not cost-effective and is difficult to scale and maintain stability*** *😕*
translations.***缺點應該是需要維護這份 Cache 資源列表，跟還是需要 Web 優化頁面: ***The downside is that you need to maintain this Cache resource list and still need to optimize the web page rendering and loading; otherwise, the perceived time for the first page to appear will still be long.***
translations.**Apps 內只能使用 Apple 提供的 WebKit Framework: **Apps can only use Apple's WebKit Framework (WKWebView) and are not allowed to use third-party or modified WebKit engines**, or they will be rejected from the App Store. Additionally, starting from iOS 17.4, to comply with regulations, users in the EU region can [use other browser engines](https://developer.apple.com/support/alternative-browser-engines/){:target="_blank"} **with special permission from Apple**.
translations.**HTTP Cache 大致運作流程如上圖：**\n\n: **The general workflow of HTTP Cache is as shown in the above diagram:**
translations.**reloadIgnoringLocalAndRemoteCacheData*: **reloadIgnoringLocalAndRemoteCacheData**: Always load data from the network, ignoring both local and remote cache.
translations.**reloadIgnoringLocalCacheData** : 不使用本地: **reloadIgnoringLocalCacheData**: Do not use local cache; each request loads data from the network (but allows network and proxy caching).
translations.**reloadRevalidatingCacheData** : 發送請求檢查: **reloadRevalidatingCacheData**: Sends a request to check if the local cache is expired. If not expired (304 Not Modified), it uses the cached data; otherwise, it reloads data from the network.
translations.**returnCacheDataDontLoad** : 僅使用快取數據，如果: **returnCacheDataDontLoad** : Use only cached data; if no cache is available, do not make a network request.
translations.**returnCacheDataElseLoad** : 如果有快取數據則使用: **returnCacheDataElseLoad**: Use cached data if available; otherwise, load data from the network.
translations.**useProtocolCachePolicy** : 默認，照默認 HTTP: **useProtocolCachePolicy** : Default, follows the default HTTP Cache control.
translations.**如果網路資源有 HTTP Cache，傳算大小則會顯示「磁碟」：**\n\n: **If the network resource has HTTP Cache, the transmitted size will show as "disk":**
translations.**影片中的完整 Demo Repo 如下：**\n\n: **The complete demo repo from the video is as follows:**
translations.**本篇文章只是就 iOS 技術上可行性進行研究，並不一定是最終解法，綜觀來說此: **This article only explores the technical feasibility on iOS and is not necessarily the final solution. Overall, it is better for frontend developers to optimize from the frontend side to achieve the most effective results.** Frontend teams should optimize the First Contentful Paint and improve the HTTP Cache mechanism. This will speed up Web/mWeb itself, positively affect the speed of Android/iOS in-app WebViews, and also boost [Google SEO ranking](https://developers.google.com/search/blog/2018/01/using-page-speed-in-mobile-search?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"}.
translations.**跟大家分享其中比較幾個有趣的方法：**\n\n: **Sharing with everyone a few interesting methods:**
translations.*Apps that browse the web must use the a: *Apps that browse the web must use the appropriate WebKit framework and WebKit JavaScript. You may apply for an entitlement to use an alternative web browser engine in your app. [Learn more about these entitlements](https://developer.apple.com/support/alternative-browser-engines/){:target="_blank"} .*
translations.*WKWebView 是跑在 App 主執行緒之外的獨立執行緒，因此所有請求、操: *WKWebView runs on a separate thread outside the App's main thread, so all requests and operations do not pass through our App.*
translations.*WKWebView 本身像是骨架、Web 頁面是血肉，研究下來優化骨架(e.g: *WKWebView itself is like the skeleton, and the web page is the flesh. Research shows that optimizing the skeleton (e.g., reusing WKProcessPool) has very limited effect, possibly a difference of 0.0003 -> 0.000015 seconds.*
translations.*一個簡單的實現，從使用者體驗下手，增加 Loading Progress Ba: *A simple implementation: improve user experience by adding a Loading Progress Bar. Don’t just show a blank page that leaves users confused. Let them know the page is loading and how far along it is. 🎉🎉🎉*
translations.*並且目前只有資源類的檔案有設定 HTTP Cache，頁面本體沒有。*\n\n: *Currently, only resource files have HTTP Cache set, not the page itself.*
translations.*以此案例幫助不大，因為是第一個畫面出現的時間太慢，而不是後續加載太慢；並且此方: *This case is not very helpful because the first screen appears too slowly, not the subsequent loading; moreover, this method causes an overly deep and strange dependency between Web and App 🫥*
translations.*個人認為現實上不可行，且利大於弊、因噎廢食。😕*\n\n: *Personally, I believe it is impractical in reality and the drawbacks outweigh the benefits, making it a case of cutting off one's nose to spite one's face.😕*
translations.*因為 in-app WKWebView 的核心還是 Web 頁面本身；因此從前: *Because the core of in-app WKWebView is still the web page itself, optimizing from the front-end web side is an effective and efficient approach. 🎉🎉🎉*
translations.*基於安全性問題，只有蘋果自己的 Safari App 支援，WKWebView: *Due to security reasons, only Apple's own Safari app supports it; WKWebView does not support it❌.*
translations.*放整個 HTML 頁面可能也會遇到 CORS 同源問題；純放網頁資源檔案感覺可: *Putting the entire HTML page may also encounter CORS same-origin issues; using "complete HTTP Cache + WKWebView Preload for pure resources" seems to be a better alternative for loading web resource files only; including them in the App Bundle just increases App Size, fetching remotely is WKWebView Preload 🫥*
translations.*緩存除了本地 Cache、在 Network Proxy Server 或途經: *Cache may exist not only locally but also on Network Proxy Servers or along the network path.*
translations.*辦法總比困難多，有時候是缺少想像。*\n\n: *There are always more solutions than difficulties; sometimes it's just a lack of imagination.*
translations.- **useProtocolCachePolicy** : Default,:
- **useProtocolCachePolicy** : Default, follows the default HTTP Cache control.

- **reloadIgnoringLocalCacheData**: Do not use local cache; each request loads data from the network (but allows network and proxy caching).

- **reloadIgnoringLocalAndRemoteCacheData**: Always load data from the network, ignoring both local and remote cache.

- **returnCacheDataElseLoad**: Use cached data if available; otherwise, load data from the network.

- **returnCacheDataDontLoad** : Use only cached data; if no cache is available, do not make a network request.

- **reloadRevalidatingCacheData**: Sends a request to check if the local cache is expired. If not expired (304 Not Modified), it uses the cached data; otherwise, it reloads data from the network.
translations.- Because http/https are system-handled:
- Because http/https are system-handled schemes, we cannot customize their handling; we need to change the scheme to one unrecognized by the system (e.g. `mycacher://`).

- All paths in the page must use relative paths to automatically apply `mycacher://` for our Handler to intercept.

- If you don't want to change http/https but still want to capture http/https requests, you have to resort to black magic. **Not recommended,** as it may cause other issues (app review rejection).

- Manually caching page files and responding may cause Ajax, XMLHttpRequest, and Fetch requests used in the page to be **blocked** by the [**CORS Same-origin Policy**](https://developer.mozilla.org/zh-TW/docs/Web/Security/Same-origin_policy){:target="_blank"}. To use this, website security must be lowered (because requests sent from mycacher:// to http://zhgchg.li/xxx are cross-origin).

- You might need to implement your own Cache Policy, such as when to update and how long it remains valid. **(This is basically what HTTP Cache does.)**
translations.- Since the page has not started loading:
- Since the page has not started loading yet, the URL will be about:blank

- If about:blank does not appear, return to XCode and click the step-by-step debug button again until it shows up.
translations.- WKProcessPool: Allows multiple WKWebVi:
- WKProcessPool: Allows multiple WKWebViews to share resources, data, cookies, and more.

- WKHTTPCookieStore: Manages WKWebView cookies, including cookies shared between WKWebViews or between URLSession in the app and WKWebView.

- WKWebsiteDataStore: Manages website cache files. (Can only read information and clear data)

- WKURLSchemeHandler: When WKWebView cannot recognize a URL Scheme, you can register a custom handler to process it.

- WKContentWorld: Allows grouping and managing injected JavaScript (WKUserScript) scripts.

- WKFindXXX: Allows control over the page search functionality.

- WKContentRuleListStore: Allows implementing content blocker features within WKWebView (e.g., blocking ads).
translations.1. Client Initiates Request\n\n2. Server:
1. Client Initiates Request

2. Server response cache strategy is set in the Response Header. The system's URLSession, WKWebView, etc., will automatically cache the response based on the Cache Header, and subsequent requests will automatically apply this strategy.

3. When requesting the same resource again, if the cache has not expired, respond directly to the App by reading the local cache from memory or disk.

4. If expired (expiration does not mean invalid), a real network request is sent to the server. If the content has not changed (still valid despite expiration), the server responds with 304 Not Modified (Empty Body). Although a real network request is made, the response is basically milliseconds and has no response body, resulting in minimal data usage.

5. If the content changes, provide the data and Cache Header again.

translations.Web Team 將以上 HTML 內容放在與 App 約定好的路徑，我們的 `: The Web Team places the above HTML content in the agreed path with the App. Our `WebViewPreloader` then loads this path, and WKWebView will parse the <link> preload resources and generate cache during loading.
translations.[未驗證] 查資料說就連 iOS 版的 Chrome, Firefox 也都是只: [Unverified] According to research, even the iOS versions of Chrome and Firefox can only use Apple WebKit (WKWebView).
translations.```csharp\nlet memoryCapacity = 512 * 10:
```csharp
let memoryCapacity = 512 * 1024 * 1024 // 512 MB
let diskCapacity = 10 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 // 10 GB
let cache = URLCache(memoryCapacity: memoryCapacity, diskCapacity: diskCapacity, diskPath: "myCache")
        
let configuration = URLSessionConfiguration.default
configuration.urlCache = cache
```
translations.```swift\nlet configuration = URLSession:
```swift
let configuration = URLSessionConfiguration.default
configuration.requestCachePolicy = .useProtocolCachePolicy
let session = URLSession(configuration: configuration)
```
translations.```swift\nlet memoryCapacity = 512 * 102:
```swift
let memoryCapacity = 512 * 1024 * 1024 // 512 MB
let diskCapacity = 10 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 // 10 GB
let urlCache = URLCache(memoryCapacity: memoryCapacity, diskCapacity: diskCapacity, diskPath: "myCache")
        
URLCache.shared = urlCache
```

translations.iOS WKWebView 預先下載與緩存資源提升頁面載入速度研究。\n\n: Research on Preloading and Caching Resources in iOS WKWebView to Improve Page Load Speed.
translations.p.s. 這是我另開的測試 WKWebView 用 Project\n\n: p.s. This is a separate test project for WKWebView.
translations.上圖是使用 ChatGPT 4o 簡介的所有 Apple iOS WebKit: The above image shows all Apple iOS WebKit (WKWebView) related methods introduced by ChatGPT 4o, along with brief descriptions; the green sections indicate methods related to data storage.
translations.不知為何，一直跟 “Cache” 緩存蠻有緣的，之前也負責研究實踐過 AVPla: For some reason, I have always had a connection with "Cache." Previously, I was responsible for researching and implementing AVPlayer’s "[iOS HLS Cache Implementation Exploration](../d796bf8e661e/)" and "[AVPlayer Local Cache Features Collection](../6ce488898003/)." Unlike streaming cache, which aims to reduce playback data usage, **this time the main task is to improve In-app WKWebView loading speed**, which also involves studying WKWebView’s preloading and caching. Honestly, the WKWebView scenario is more complex. Unlike AVPlayer streaming media, which consists of one or multiple continuous chunk files that only need file caching, WKWebView not only handles page files but also imported resource files (.js, .css, font, image…) that are rendered by the browser engine to display the page to the user. Many aspects in this process are beyond the app’s control, from the network to frontend JavaScript performance and rendering methods, all of which require time.
translations.久違的回歸撰寫 iOS 開發相關長篇文章。\n\n: A long-awaited return to writing in-depth articles about iOS development.
translations.以上就是本次探究 WKWebView 預載與緩存可行方案的一些發想研究，技術反而: This concludes our exploration of feasible WKWebView preload and cache solutions. Technology itself is not the biggest issue; the key is choosing methods that are most effective for users while minimizing development costs. Selecting the right approach may only require minor adjustments to achieve the goal directly. Choosing the wrong method can lead to wasting significant resources in circles and may cause difficulties in maintenance and usage later on.
translations.優化提升 WKWebView Load View 的性能。\n\n: Optimize and Improve WKWebView Load View Performance.
translations.再回到 Safari 開發者工具就能看到資源載入狀況跟完整的開發者工具功能了 (: Back in Safari Developer Tools, you can see the resource loading status along with the full developer tools features (components, storage debugging, etc.).
translations.再次請求相同資源時，如果緩存未過期則直接從記憶體、磁碟讀取本地緩存直接回應給 A: When requesting the same resource again, if the cache has not expired, respond directly to the App by reading the local cache from memory or disk.
translations.出現該頁面對應的開發者工具：\n\n: The developer tools corresponding to this page appear:
translations.參考 [wedevs 優化建議](https://wedevs.com/blog: Referencing [wedevs optimization suggestions](https://wedevs.com/blog/348939/first-contentful-paint-largest-contentful-paint/){:target="_blank"}, the front-end HTML page generally has four loading stages: from initially loading the page file (.html) to First Paint (blank page), then First Contentful Paint (rendering the page skeleton), followed by First Meaningful Paint (adding page content), and finally Time To Interactive (when the user can interact).
translations.另外也可以參考 [Google PageSpeed Insights](http: You can also refer to [Google PageSpeed Insights](https://pagespeed.web.dev/){:target="_blank"} for optimization suggestions, such as compression, reducing script size, and more.
translations.另外作者也有提到 WKURLSchemeHandler 的方法。\n\n: The author also mentioned the WKURLSchemeHandler method.
translations.另外想到我們的老朋友 [URLProtocol](https://develop: Also, let's consider our old friend [URLProtocol](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/urlprotocol){:target="_blank"}, which can intercept and handle all requests based on the `URL Loading System` (URLSession, openURL, etc.).
translations.可使用以上方法清除 WKWebView 已緩存的資源、本地數據、Cookie 數: You can use the above methods to clear WKWebView's cached resources, local data, and cookie data.
translations.可能需要自己實現 Cache Policy，例如那何時該更新？有效多久？ **(: You might need to implement your own Cache Policy, such as when to update and how long it remains valid. **(This is basically what HTTP Cache does.)**
translations.回 XCode 點擊繼續執行：\n\n: Go back to XCode and click Continue to run:
translations.回到 Safari，選擇工具列的「開發」->「模擬器」->「你的專案」->「ab: Back to Safari, select the toolbar menu "Develop" -> "Simulator" -> "Your Project" -> "about:blank".
translations.回到 iOS 上，因為我們只能使用 Apple WebKit，因此只能從蘋果提供: Back to iOS, since we can only use Apple WebKit, we have to rely on the WebKit methods provided by Apple to explore possible ways to achieve preload caching.
translations.因為 http/https 是系統能處理的 Scheme 所以我們不能自定義 h: Because http/https are system-handled schemes, we cannot customize their handling; we need to change the scheme to one unrecognized by the system (e.g. `mycacher://`).
translations.因為頁面尚未開始載入 所以網址會是 about:blank\n: Since the page has not started loading yet, the URL will be about:blank
translations.在 HTTP 協議中就有包含 Cache 協議，並且在所有跟網路有關的元件(UR: The HTTP protocol already includes Cache mechanisms, and all network-related components (URLSession, WKWebView, etc.) have built-in Cache handling by the system. Therefore, the client app does not need to implement anything, and it is not recommended to create a custom Cache system. Relying directly on the HTTP protocol is the fastest, most stable, and most effective approach.
translations.在 `webView.load` 的地方下一個斷點。\n\n: Set a breakpoint at the `webView.load` line.
translations.執行到 webView.load 斷點時，點擊「逐行偵錯」。\n\n: When reaching the breakpoint at webView.load, click "Step Over".
translations.基於上面方法的優化，我們可以搭配 HTML Link Preload 方法，僅針: Based on the above optimization methods, we can use the HTML Link Preload approach to preload only the resource files used in the page (e.g., .js, .css, font, image…). This allows users to directly use cached resources without making additional network requests for those files.
translations.基於完善 HTTP Cache 之後，第二次 Load WKWebView 會有: After improving the HTTP Cache, the second time WKWebView loads, it will have cached data. We can preload all URLs from the list or homepage once to create the cache, so when users enter, the loading will be faster.
translations.如同前文介紹的 HTTP Cache 機制，我們可以請 Web Team 完善活: As introduced earlier about the HTTP Cache mechanism, we can ask the Web Team to improve the HTTP Cache settings for the event pages. On the Client iOS side, we only need to simply check the CachePolicy settings; the system handles everything else!
translations.如果不想改 http/https 又想獲取 http/https 請求只能上黑魔: If you don't want to change http/https but still want to capture http/https requests, you have to resort to black magic. **Not recommended,** as it may cause other issues (app review rejection).
translations.如果內容有更改則重新給一次資料跟 Cache Header。\n: If the content changes, provide the data and Cache Header again.
translations.如果已過期(過期不代表無效)，則發起真實網路請求問 Server，如果內容沒更改: If expired (expiration does not mean invalid), a real network request is sent to the server. If the content has not changed (still valid despite expiration), the server responds with 304 Not Modified (Empty Body). Although a real network request is made, the response is basically milliseconds and has no response body, resulting in minimal data usage.
translations.如果沒出現 about:blank 就再回到 XCode 點一次逐行偵錯按鈕，直: If about:blank does not appear, go back to XCode and click the step-by-step debug button again until it shows up.
translations.感覺 WKURLSchemeHandler 這方法比較適合針對網頁內有很大的資源: It seems that the WKURLSchemeHandler method is more suitable for handling large resource files within a webpage by declaring a custom scheme for the App to process, working together to render the webpage.
translations.抽象想法一樣是在背景偷發 WKWebView -> Request -> WKU: The abstract idea is to secretly send WKWebView -> Request -> WKURLSchemeHandler in the background to download all resources by itself, then the user -> WKWebView -> Request -> WKURLSchemeHandler -> responds with the preloaded resources.
translations.抽象想法是在背景偷發 URLReqeust -> URLProtocol ->: The abstract idea is to secretly send URLRequest in the background -> URLProtocol -> download all resources by itself, while the user -> WKWebView -> Request -> URLProtocol -> responds with the preloaded resources.
translations.更詳細的 HTTP Cache 運作細節可參考「 [Huli 大大寫的循序漸進理: For more detailed HTTP Cache operation details, please refer to "[Huli's Step-by-Step Guide to Understanding HTTP Cache Mechanism](https://blog.techbridge.cc/2017/06/17/cache-introduction/){:target="_blank"}".
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.檢查是否是使用本地 Cache 快取。\n\n: Check if local Cache is being used.
translations.用我們的頁面測試；瀏覽器、WKWebView 會先請求頁面本體 .html 再載: Test with our page; browsers and WKWebView first request the main .html page, then load the required resources, while building the UI for the user according to the scripts. Compared to the article, the page stage only includes First Paint (blank) to Time To Interactive (First Contentful Paint showing only the Navigation Bar, which probably doesn't count much…), missing intermediate staged rendering for the user. As a result, the overall user wait time is extended.
translations.老司機週報中關於 WkWebView 的分享也值得一看。\n\n: The sharing about WKWebView in the Old Driver Weekly Report is also worth reading.
translations.自行緩存頁面檔案並響應，頁面中使用的 Ajax, XMLHttpRequest,: Manually caching page files and responding may cause Ajax, XMLHttpRequest, and Fetch requests used in the page to be **blocked** by the [**CORS Same-origin Policy**](https://developer.mozilla.org/zh-TW/docs/Web/Security/Same-origin_policy){:target="_blank"}. To use this, website security must be lowered (because requests sent from mycacher:// to http://zhgchg.li/xxx are cross-origin).
translations.蘋果不給的，我們也不能做。\n\n: What Apple doesn't allow, we cannot do either.
translations.蘋果在 iOS 11 推出的新方法，感覺是為了補足 WKWebView 無法使用: Apple introduced a new method in iOS 11, seemingly to compensate for WKWebView's inability to use URLProtocol; however, this method is similar to [AVPlayer's ResourceLoader](../6ce488898003/), where **only schemes unrecognized by the system are handed over to our custom WKURLSchemeHandler for processing**.
translations.說不定也有我沒想到的神級組合做法，歡迎大家協助補充。\n\n: There might be other brilliant combinations I haven't thought of. Everyone is welcome to contribute additional ideas.
translations.請注意：這邊依然走的是 HTTP Cache，因此這些資源也要支援 HTTP C: Please note: HTTP Cache is still used here, so these resources must support HTTP Cache; otherwise, future requests will still go through the network.
translations.頁面裡面統一都要用相對路徑才會自動套上 `mycacher://` 讓我們的 H: All paths in the page must use relative paths to automatically apply `mycacher://` for our Handler to intercept.
translations.類似 Preload 方式，只是改成將活動頁放入 App Bundle 或是啟動: Similar to the Preload method, but the event page is placed in the App Bundle or fetched remotely at launch.
translations.點進去也能看到緩存資訊。\n\n: Clicking in also shows the cache information.
